description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整

2026-06-01T06:05:00.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 1 June 2026:
Park Island Transport Company Limited
'Ma Wan - Central' Route:
- Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)
- Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)

'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route:
- Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled
- Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled
.
2026-06-01T06:05:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下渡輪服務於2026年6⽉1⽇作出臨時調整：
珀麗灣客運有限公司
「⾺灣-中環」航線：
-⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運
-中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運

「⾺灣-荃灣」航線：
-⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次
-荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次
。

2026-06-06T10:05:00.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2026-06-06T10:05:00.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail train trips cancelled due to adverse weather conditions
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路列車車次由於天氣情況惡劣取消

2026-06-07T14:45:00.CONTENT_EN:
Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that, as informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, the following High Speed Rail train trips will be cancelled due to adverse weather conditions:
From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shanghai Hongqiao Station
8 Jun: G900
From Shanghai Hongqiao Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station
8 Jun: G899
For latest train schedules, please refer to 12306 official website. You may also check latest train information from the HSR website, mobile app or the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
For ticket refunds, please refer to the High Speed Rail website and process within the time stated. Please use the 12306 official website or mobile app and there is no need to rush to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2026-06-07T14:45:00.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，中國內地鐵路單位通報，由於天氣情況惡劣，下列高速鐵路列車車次取消：
由香港西九龍站前往上海虹橋站
6月8日：G900
由上海虹橋站前往香港西九龍站
6月8日：G899
有關車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)，如已安裝手機應用程式，可按「車站大屏」頁面。您亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁、手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。
如需退票，請參閱高速鐵路網頁並於指定日期內辦理。請盡量使用12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式，不用急於到香港西九龍站辦理。

2026-06-08T19:50:00.CONTENT_EN: Red Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.

2026-06-08T21:34:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to unstable weather and preventative flooding measures are in place, the following entrances/exits are temporarily closed. Station Entrances/Exits Wong Tai Sin: B3 Choi Hung: A1 Quarry Bay: A Sham Shui Po: A2 Please use other entrances/exits.
2026-06-08T21:34:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於天氣不穩，以下車站出入口暫時關閉以便作防護措施。 車站出入口 黃大仙:B3 彩虹:A1 鰂魚涌:A 深水埗:A2 請使用其他出入口。
